headline: See yourself clearly. Every session.
subhead: Two products. Same commitment to precision.

tiers.name: Meridian
tiers.description: The full real-time PSI monitor for active traders.
features: Real-time PSI — updates in under 100ms after every fill
Seven independent behavioral dimensions in one composite score
Baselines calibrated from your own session history
Native NinjaTrader 8 add-on — no cloud, no accounts

tiers.name: Meridian Guard
tiers.description: Advanced protection for serious traders. More details coming soon.

footnote: Meridian is billed at $24.99/month or $239.88/year after the 7-day free trial. Meridian Guard is billed at $34.99/month or $359.88/year after the 7-day free trial. Cancel any time before the trial ends and you will not be charged. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Meridian does not provide trading signals or investment advice. Results may vary.
